title: My Own Loots
description: My Own Loot is a datapack inspiered by the lootr that lets everyone loot the same chest to get loots
body:
This datapack is inspiered by the [lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) mod.\
This datapack allows each player to loot the same chest once

Chests are dynamically replace arround the player to be compatible with datapack/mods with custom structures\
Each chunk is tested at most once to prevent lag

Theses chest being individual to each player, they can also serve as secured chest (kinda like enderchests) but be carefule as all their content will be lost if you breaks it
